creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Actually, this might be even better:

diff --git a/security/vuxml/vuln-2022.xml b/security/vuxml/vuln-2022.xml
index 279497a8eafc..cf01d3de9614 100644
--- a/security/vuxml/vuln-2022.xml
+++ b/security/vuxml/vuln-2022.xml
@@ -90,13 +90,11 @@
     <affects>
       <package>
        <name>xrdp</name>
-       <range><lt>0.9.18.1</lt></range>
-       <range><ge>0.9.17</ge></range>
+       <range><lt>0.9.18.1</lt><ge>0.9.17</ge></range>
       </package>
       <package>
        <name>xrdp-devel</name>
-       <range><lt>0.9.18.1</lt></range>
-       <range><ge>0.9.17</ge></range>
+       <range><lt>0.9.18.1</lt><ge>0.9.17</ge></range>
       </package>

     </affects>

The trick is to have a single range entity for each package entity. Otherwise, having two or more ranges acts like inclusive OR in most programming languages, and as such defeats the entire purpose.
